heading: Definitions
label: 60102 Definitions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 13726a of Title 42

children.heading: Crime of violence
children.label: 1 Crime of violence
children.text: The term “crime of violence” has the same meaning as in .section 924(c)(3) of title 18

children.heading: Private prisoner transport company
children.label: 2 Private prisoner transport company
children.text: The term “private prisoner transport company” means any entity, other than the United States, a State, or an inferior political subdivision of a State, which engages in the business of the transporting for compensation, individuals committed to the custody of any State or of an inferior political subdivision of a State, or any attempt thereof.

children.heading: Violent prisoner
children.label: 3 Violent prisoner
children.text: The term “violent prisoner” means any individual in the custody of a State or an inferior political subdivision of a State who has previously been convicted of or is currently charged with a crime of violence or any similar statute of a State or the inferior political subdivisions of a State, or any attempt thereof.
